name: EDW2BMbrPHstdBcbsaMvpsCtlUpdt

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT MIN(CYC_2B_ID) AS CYC_2B_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycleDate}' AS CYC_2B_CMPL_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.P_HSTD_BCBSA_MVPS_CTL WHERE CYC_2B_CMPL_DT_SK = '1753-01-01' GROUP BY CYC_2B_CMPL_DT_SK ) INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.P_HSTD_BCBSA_MVPS_CTL (CYC_2B_ID, CYC_2B_CMPL_DT_SK) SELECT CYC_2B_ID, CYC_2B_CMPL_DT_SK FROM cte
